message:
style: rustfmt sweep across frankenterm-core, tests, and fuzz targets

Second rustfmt pass in this session, landing the remaining reflows that
showed up after the first formatting commit. Zero behavioral change — every
hunk is whitespace, line-break, import ordering, comment-gutter alignment,
or enum-variant-block formatting that cargo fmt --all enforces.

## Source (crates/frankenterm-core/src/)

Eight files with identical trailing-blank-line-inside-block cleanup where
a cfg-gated block ends with an extra blank line before its closing brace
(rustfmt::needless_blank_lines_after_last_statement pattern):
  - native_events.rs: inside NativeEventListener::run
  - orphan_reaper.rs: inside run_orphan_reaper
  - replay.rs: inside check_control
  - retry.rs: inside with_retry_and_circuit
  - watchdog.rs: inside spawn_mux_watchdog

runtime_compat.rs: collapse three single-statement `{ expr }` block forms
onto one line (spawn_blocking-via-asupersync, watch_has_changed,
watch_borrow_and_update_clone) — rustfmt reflow target, zero semantic
effect since the outer block is the function body.

storage.rs (~80 hunks): flatten `self\n    .method_with_cx(...)` chains
onto `self.method_with_cx(...)` where the reflow fits within max line
width. Covers StorageHandle::append_segment, mark_event_handled,
set_event_triage_state, set_event_note, add_event_label,
mark_action_undone, purge_audit_actions_before,
update_saved_search_run, update_saved_search_schedule,
update_notification_status, and ~dozen peer entry points — all the same
shape. Also collapses one `{ self.inner.capacity() }` block form in
WriteCommandSender::max_capacity.

patterns.rs, recording.rs, search_bridge.rs, vendored/mux_client.rs:
similar self-chain flattening plus a handful of trailing-blank cleanups.

## Tests (crates/frankenterm-core/tests/ + mux-server-impl/tests/)

  - conformance_capture_record.rs: reflow raw_frame() signature and
    several raw_frame(...) call sites that exceeded the line budget into
    argument-per-line form. Identical semantics.
  - conformance_mcp_manifest.rs: alphabetize serde_json::{json, Value}
    import to {Value, json}.
  - conformance_post_xbnl02_5.rs: import ordering + minor line-break
    reflow around assertion helpers.
  - golden_integration.rs: reorder wire_protocol imports alphabetically,
    reflow a fs::write().unwrap_or_else(...) call, and compact some
    inline comments on PaneMeta struct literal fields.
  - metamorphic_pattern_trigger_scan.rs, proptest_patterns_metamorphic.rs,
    snapshot_e2e.rs: various call-chain reflows + import sort.
  - frankenterm-mux-server-impl/tests/dispatch_conformance.rs: single
    reflow.

## Fuzz targets (fuzz/fuzz_targets/)

  - ipc_auth_envelope.rs: expand RequestKind enum variants that had
    inline field lists into multi-line-per-field form (PaneState, UserVar,
    SetPanePriority, ClearPanePriority) — rustfmt prefers the expanded
    form once any variant has >1 field. Also reformats an
    EnvelopeMode::TopLevelIs match arm from continuation-line into
    block form.
  - protocol_recovery_state.rs: analogous enum + match-arm reflow.

Runs clean under cargo fmt --check after this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
